creator: oberman@es.net
text:
When I upgrade a system to FreeBSD 8.0, the Clock applet no longer displays weather information. The configuration is still present in 'Preferences...', but it does not appear in the applet display.

This happened on both systems I have upgraded to 8.0.

I am unsure whether the problem showed up prior to re-installing ports as I dud that immediately after the upgrade of the OS. I also don't know if it shows up on a fresh install.

Fix: 

Not known.
How-To-Repeat: Upgrade a system wiht weather information configured in the Clock applet.
